ets_target_policy: quality-gated expansion; 3000 is not a hard quota
target_score_band: TOEFL iBT overall band 5 on the 1-6 scale introduced January 21, 2026
awl_generation_note: AWL card files are structurally validated and have already received repeated Korean-gloss cleanup passes, though periodic manual spot review is still recommended.
selection_principles: No claim of an official ETS 3000 word list
ETS-based means aligned to official/public ETS TOEFL materials and test descriptions
Cross-disciplinary academic vocabulary prioritized over narrow technical terms
Modern academic-life contexts prioritized for the 2026 TOEFL direction
Meaning counts stay flexible by TOEFL usefulness rather than fixed card symmetry
AWL handled by headword, not by uncontrolled derivative expansion
Do not force low-utility tail words just to reach 3000 cards
quality_checks: compact card-back label/order validation with 핵심 뜻 required and 구분 optional
low-value generic comparator pruning in distinction lines
strict study-efficiency review for low-value distinctions and narrow specialist headwords
